name: ASCO Video
headline: 3D Animated Video
description: 5 minute long, fully 3d rendered animated opening video for BMS at the ASCO conference in 2012.

name: Spotify Codes
headline: Single Page App
description: Created single page app that described what the codes where and how to use them and also leveraged Spotify's API to generate them.

name: Amex DLS
headline: Developer Toolkit
description: Worked on the toolkit used by American Express designers and devlopers across all their digital assets

name: Pride Parade
headline: Interactive Web App
description: Single Page app celebrating the Pride Parade that allows users to ride digital floats with face overlays and fun environments

name: The Claw
headline: Interactive Experience
description: Rewired an antique claw machine game with Raspberry Pi's to be playable over livestreaming cameras with little to no latency

name: Wedding Website
headline: Interactive Super Hi Res Photo
description: Used a HiRes Digital SLR with Microsoft's DeepZoom library to create super large zoomable photo with embedded waypoints

name: Nowhere Bound
headline: Interactive Music Video
description: Filmed musician with a moving camera rig in several locations then used VFX to create interesting transitions between shots and allow users to jump between shots on command

name: LG at CES
headline: Video Installation
description: 20' tall synchonized HD video wall using networked graphics computers with custom software.
